title: AI Beauty Personalization SaaS Platform for Brands & Retailers | Revieve

headers.text: AI SaaS Platform for Scalable Beauty Personalization
AI-Powered Reporting and Analytics for Intelligent Beauty Decisions
AI Data Infrastructure for Secure, Scalable Personalization
Why Choose Revieve’s Platform?
AI Solution driven technology
Partner Stories
Empowering Innovation With Leading Technology Partners
Unlock the Power of AI-Driven Personalization Today
Unified AI Beauty Platform
Fast, Flexible & Extensible Integrations
Seamless Omnichannel Beauty Experience
Empowering Consumers & Experts
Enterprise-Grade AI Technology
Privacy, Security & Data Ownership
Empowering Skincare Expertise in Taiwan with Paula’s Choice and Revieve
Redefining Excellence in Beauty and Skincare with BABOR and Revieve - Unprecedented Success Through Increased Conversions and Enhanced Customer Retention with Cutting-edge Advisor Solutions

Elevating Beauty Retail Standards: JCPenney and Revieve Achieve Remarkable Success with Innovative AI Advisors and Next Gen True-To-Life Makeup Artist VTO Solutions Driving Higher Conversions and Engagement
‍Revieve Launches 'Match My Look' & 'Shop the Look' for Makeup, Enhanced by BeautyML and Google Cloud’s Vertex AI - Revolutionizing Personalized Beauty Shopping
Trinny London, Revieve, and Google Cloud Introduce Next-Generation Skincare Journey
Revieve Unveils Hair Color Artist: Redefining Virtual Hair Color Try-On with Cutting-Edge AI Technology from Revieve and Google Cloud
Revieve Launches Beauty Technology Platform on Google Cloud Marketplace
Revieve Joins Google Cloud Booth at NRF 2025 to Showcase the Future of Retail Innovation

paragraphs: Deliver high-impact consumer journeys with Revieve’s enterprise-grade AI SaaS platform, built exclusively for beauty brands and retailers looking to personalize every touchpoint. Unify AI skin analysis, virtual try-on, conversational and contextual discovery, inspirational product journeys, and personalized recommendations with Revieve’s full-spectrum AI platform—designed for enterprise scale, data security, actionable insights, and omnichannel activation.
Transform Insights into Impact

Unlock visibility and intelligence with Revieve’s AI-driven Reporting & Analytics. Access real-time performance dashboards, consumer-journey analytics, and category-level insights to measure outcomes, refine personalization, optimize assortment and marketing, and drive ROI across every channel.
Empower Data. Elevate Decisions.

Empower your business with Revieve’s privacy-first AI data foundation, purpose-built for beauty brands and retailers. Capture, unify, and activate zero and first-party data to fuel personalization, guide innovation, and drive measurable growth—all while maintaining full ownership, transparency, and compliance.
Core Features of the Platform
Revieve’s platform delivers cutting-edge AI and AR technologies, rich data insights, and an unmatched ability to create engaging and comprehensive consumer journeys for beauty and wellness brands.

Revieve’sAI beauty platformpowersend-to-end personalized experiencesacross skincare, makeup, hair, and wellness. ThroughConversational AI, diagnostics, and Live AR Try-On, it connects intent to purchase,drives conversion and loyalty, and captures valuable insights for smarter decisions.

LaunchAI-driven experiencesquickly and scale effortlessly. Revieve’smodular platformintegrates with leading beauty, retail, and e-commerce systems—enablingfast activation, smooth data flow, and seamless connections across digital ecosystems.

Deliver aconsistent beauty experienceacross your entire ecosystem—from brand sites to retail and partner environments. Revieve connects every touchpoint, enabling personalized journeys that move effortlessly between digital and in-store experiences.

Empower consumers and beauty consultants with intuitiveAI beauty solutions. CombiningAI diagnostics,Live AR Try-On, andintelligent recommendations, Revieve deliverscomprehensive personalizationand confidence-building experiences powered by real-time insights.

Built for performance and reliability, Revieve’senterprise-grade AI platformscales effortlessly, supports real-time analytics, and delivers smooth, high-speed experiences—enabling brands to provide consistent, personalized interactions worldwide.

Revieve ensuresdata privacy, transparency, and complianceat every level. FullyGDPR- and CCPA-compliant, the platform guarantees security and full ownership of customer data—building trust across every consumer interaction.

Deliver real-time, AI-powered skin analysis that helps educate consumers, personalize skincare routines, and build long-term loyalty. Trusted by leading beauty brands and proven across 60M+ users and 15M+ selfies.

With Revieve’s Brand Philosophy solution, skincare brands can construct and communicate their skincare philosophy in a unique way, seamlessly align skin analysis and product recommendations with their mission and values, and enhance consumer engagement and loyalty through personalized digital experiences.
The most flexible and configurable recommendation solution for beauty in the market.
The most flexible and configurable recommendation solution for beauty in the market.

Give shoppers a curated, real-time virtual try-on experience that mimics the touch of a makeup artist. From foundations to lipsticks and full-face looks, AI-powered technology delivers hyper-realistic results—boosting confidence, engagement, and conversions.
Empowering Skincare Expertise in Taiwan with Paula’s Choice and Revieve

Driving Strategic Brand Positioning Through Personalized Digital Innovation. In this case study, we explore the impactful partnership between Paula’s Choice Taiwan and beauty tech leader Revieve. With Paula’s Choice aiming to elevate its image as a skincare and ingredient expert in the Taiwan market, the brand turned to Revieve’s AI-powered digital solution to support a campaign focused on exfoliation—a key skincare concern among their consumers. The partnership not only delivered strong engagement and conversion results but also reinforced Paula’s Choice’s commitment to science-backed skincare and technological innovation.
Redefining Excellence in Beauty and Skincare with BABOR and Revieve - Unprecedented Success Through Increased Conversions and Enhanced Customer Retention with Cutting-edge Advisor Solutions

This partnership highlights the remarkable synergy between BABOR's brand philosophy and Revieve's cutting-edge Advisor solutions, which have contributed to unprecedented success in beauty & skincare and the promise of future potential.

Elevating Beauty Retail Standards: JCPenney and Revieve Achieve Remarkable Success with Innovative AI Advisors and Next Gen True-To-Life Makeup Artist VTO Solutions Driving Higher Conversions and Engagement

In this case study, we explore the game-changing collaboration between the renowned retailer JCPenney and the advanced AI beauty tech platform Revieve. This partnership exemplifies the powerful alignment of JCPenney's brand values with Revieve’s state-of-the-art Advisor solutions, resulting in outstanding achievements in makeup, haircare and skincare. The integration of Revieve's innovative technologies has significantly enhanced JCPenney’s customer acquisition, data collection, and engagement, establishing new benchmarks in the industry.
Revieve collaborates with industry leaders in AI, AR, and cloud technology to power seamless beauty experiences.
‍Revieve Launches 'Match My Look' & 'Shop the Look' for Makeup, Enhanced by BeautyML and Google Cloud’s Vertex AI - Revolutionizing Personalized Beauty Shopping

These solutions redefine personalized beauty shopping, offering tailored experiences for consumers, streamlined integration for retailers, and enhanced engagement for brands. This collaboration marks a significant leap forward in beauty retail, leveraging advanced technology to revolutionize the customer experience.
Trinny London, Revieve, and Google Cloud Introduce Next-Generation Skincare Journey
This collaboration launches the Trinny London Digital Skincare Advisor, a Revieve AI-powered solution on Google Cloud infrastructure set to revolutionize skincare consultations.
Revieve Unveils Hair Color Artist: Redefining Virtual Hair Color Try-On with Cutting-Edge AI Technology from Revieve and Google Cloud
The latest innovative haircare technology leverages Next Gen AI to provide consumers with hyper-realistic, interactive hair color experiences.
Revieve Launches Beauty Technology Platform on Google Cloud Marketplace
Revieve has expanded its partnership with Google Cloud by making its Digital Beauty Platform available on Google Cloud Marketplace.
Revieve Joins Google Cloud Booth at NRF 2025 to Showcase the Future of Retail Innovation
Revieve® is thrilled to be featured in Google Cloud’s booth at NRF 2025: Retail’s Big Show, joining a global gathering of leading brands and industry professionals.
Industry-Leading Al & Proprietary Technology
Transform beauty experiences with Revieve’s AI-powered platform. Start personalizing consumer journeys today.
